title: Three Girls from Rome
writer: Sergio Amidei, Fausto Tozzi, Karin Valde
actors: Lucia Bosè, Cosetta Greco, Marcello Mastroianni
plot: Three beautiful seamstresses from one of the fashionable dress salons near the Piazza de Spagna in Rome gather on the steps of the square to eat lunch and talk of their love lives. Marisa, the oldest in a large family, is engaged ...
